auth.label: SCIM Bearer Token
auth.description: Roam SCIM bearer token sent in the Authorization header. Enable SCIM in Roam Administration > Technical Setup to generate the token: https://ro.am/s/.

actions.name: create_group
actions.description: Create a Roam SCIM group with optional initial members.

displayName.description: The Roam SCIM group displayName value.

items.description: One Roam Person ID used as members[].value.

memberIds.description: Roam Person IDs to include as SCIM group members.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for creating a Roam SCIM group.

schemas.description: SCIM schema URNs returned by Roam.

id.description: The Roam Address ID returned as the SCIM group id.

displayName.description: The group displayName returned by Roam SCIM.

value.description: The Roam Person ID for this group member.

items.description: A SCIM group member object returned by Roam.

meta.description: SCIM metadata returned for the resource.

actions.name: create_user
actions.description: Create a Roam SCIM user from name, email, and optional role metadata.

email.description: The user's primary email address. Roam uses this as both userName and emails[0].value.

externalId.description: The optional external identifier used to correlate this user with an identity provider.

active.description: Whether the Roam user should be active. Set false to archive access.

role.description: The Roam Administration role assigned through the SCIM extension.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for creating a Roam SCIM user.

schemas.description: SCIM schema URNs returned by Roam.

id.description: The Roam Person ID returned as the SCIM user id.

userName.description: The SCIM userName returned by Roam, usually the primary email.

externalId.description: The externalId returned by Roam SCIM when present.

givenName.description: The givenName returned for the user.

familyName.description: The familyName returned for the user.

name.description: The SCIM name object returned for a Roam user.

displayName.description: The display name returned by Roam SCIM.

value.description: The email value returned by Roam SCIM.

type.description: The email type returned by Roam SCIM.

primary.description: Whether this email is the primary SCIM email.

items.description: A SCIM email object returned for a Roam user.

emails.description: Email objects returned for the user.

active.description: Whether the Roam user is active.

role.description: The Roam Administration role assigned through the SCIM extension.

urn:ro.am:params:scim:schemas:extension:.description: The Roam SCIM user role extension object.

meta.description: SCIM metadata returned for the resource.

actions.name: delete_group
actions.description: Archive a Roam SCIM group by Roam Address ID.

id.description: The Roam SCIM resource ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Roam SCIM resource.

id.description: The Roam SCIM resource ID.

archived.description: Whether the resource archive request completed.

actions.name: delete_user
actions.description: Archive a Roam SCIM user by Roam Person ID.

id.description: The Roam SCIM resource ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Roam SCIM resource.

id.description: The Roam SCIM resource ID.

archived.description: Whether the resource archive request completed.

actions.name: get_group
actions.description: Get one Roam SCIM group by Roam Address ID.

id.description: The Roam SCIM resource ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Roam SCIM resource.

schemas.description: SCIM schema URNs returned by Roam.

id.description: The Roam Address ID returned as the SCIM group id.

displayName.description: The group displayName returned by Roam SCIM.

value.description: The Roam Person ID for this group member.

items.description: A SCIM group member object returned by Roam.

meta.description: SCIM metadata returned for the resource.

actions.name: get_service_provider_config
actions.description: Get the Roam SCIM service provider configuration.

inputSchema.description: No input parameters are required for this Roam SCIM request.

config.description: The raw SCIM object returned by Roam.

outputSchema.description: The Roam SCIM service provider configuration response.

actions.name: get_user
actions.description: Get one Roam SCIM user by Roam Person ID.

schemas.description: SCIM schema URNs returned by Roam.

id.description: The Roam Person ID returned as the SCIM user id.

userName.description: The SCIM userName returned by Roam, usually the primary email.

externalId.description: The externalId returned by Roam SCIM when present.

givenName.description: The givenName returned for the user.

familyName.description: The familyName returned for the user.

name.description: The SCIM name object returned for a Roam user.

displayName.description: The display name returned by Roam SCIM.

value.description: The email value returned by Roam SCIM.

type.description: The email type returned by Roam SCIM.

primary.description: Whether this email is the primary SCIM email.

items.description: A SCIM email object returned for a Roam user.

emails.description: Email objects returned for the user.

active.description: Whether the Roam user is active.

actions.name: list_groups
actions.description: List Roam SCIM groups with optional pagination.

filter.description: A SCIM filter expression accepted by Roam SCIM.

startIndex.description: The one-based SCIM startIndex pagination value.

count.description: The maximum number of SCIM resources to return.

schemas.description: SCIM schema URNs returned by Roam.

id.description: The Roam Address ID returned as the SCIM group id.

value.description: The Roam Person ID for this group member.

items.description: A SCIM group member object returned by Roam.

schemas.description: SCIM schema URNs returned by Roam.

totalResults.description: Total matching SCIM resources across all pages.

startIndex.description: The one-based SCIM startIndex returned for this page.

itemsPerPage.description: The number of SCIM resources returned in this page.

raw.description: The raw SCIM object returned by Roam.

outputSchema.description: A page of Roam SCIM groups.

items.description: A SCIM email object returned for a Roam user.

actions.name: set_user_active

active.description: Whether the Roam user should be active. Set false to archive access.

actions.name: update_group_members
actions.description: Patch Roam SCIM group members with add, remove, or replace semantics.

id.description: The Roam SCIM resource ID.

operation.description: The SCIM PATCH operation to apply to the members attribute.

items.description: One Roam Person ID used as members[].value.

memberIds.description: Roam Person IDs to add, remove, or replace in a SCIM group.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for patching Roam SCIM group members.

schemas.description: SCIM schema URNs returned by Roam.

id.description: The Roam Address ID returned as the SCIM group id.

displayName.description: The group displayName returned by Roam SCIM.

value.description: The Roam Person ID for this group member.

items.description: A SCIM group member object returned by Roam.

meta.description: SCIM metadata returned for the resource.

outputSchema.description: Roam SCIM group member update response.
